title: Uzbekistan Injuries - Yahoo Sports
original_text:
Jaron 'Boots' Ennis pummels, stops Xander Zayas to capture unified titles
Reporter apologizes for joke about not knowing where Bosnia and Herzegovina is

WWE Night of Champions: Sami Zayn shockingly wins WWE title
Harry Kane becomes England's all-time leading World Cup goal scorer
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
